nits: ADAPTER_BACKED_TRIGGERS event slugs are case-sensitive (toolkit is lowercased, event is not); if a caller passes a lowercased event slug the set lookup misses and degrades to managed polling — current callers use uppercase Composio slugs so this is latent only

filters JSONB insert uses `${JSON.stringify(filters)}::jsonb` template-cast rather than `sql.json(filters)`; the server-side text→jsonb cast still produces correct JSONB so it's not a data-corruption bug, but it's the pattern MEMORY.md flags — mirrors the existing composio_triggers INSERT so consistency-wise it's fine

state column seeded as `{}` rather than calling adapter.initialState as the spec literally requests; spec-aligned behaviorally (adapters defensively re-baseline) and explicitly accepted to avoid api→worker package coupling
ADAPTER_BACKED_TRIGGERS is hand-maintained; a worker-side adapter added without updating this set silently routes through Composio managed polling — operator accepted
